content: If responsibilities of files or modules changes, update the [architecture.md](mdc:docs/architecture.md)
If new python files or modules are introduced, update the [architecture.md](mdc:docs/architecture.md)
Make sure code has high cohesion and low coupling through: Favor composition (eg. through dependency injection) over inheritance
Make sure code has high cohesion and low coupling through: Favor pure functions over state mutation
